task.en: Using Finder, create a folder structure on the Desktop: `~/Desktop/Reports/2026/`. Then inside the `2026` folder, create a plain-text file `summary.txt` containing exactly the single line `Q1 report TBD` (no trailing blank line).

grading_command: printf 'Q1 report TBD\n' > /tmp/_expected_q1.txt && cmp -s /tmp/_expected_q1.txt "$HOME/Desktop/Reports/2026/summary.txt" && echo True || echo False
